untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'early warning signals 1-2 months prior to predicted event' and 'market confirmation signal' which are abstract regime-change predictors not quantifiable with provided indicators. The signal also requires subjective thesis validation and contingency plan readiness states that cannot be expressed as technical indicator conditions. Deployed approximation using volatility and trend strength, but core predictive logic is not translatable to mechanical rules.
translation_notes: Approximated 'early warning signal' using elevated volatility (hvol_20 > 0.02) and weak trend (adx_14 < 25) to detect potential regime change. Exit triggers scaled position when 3% gain achieved (returns > 0.03). Defensive positioning intent captured via hold_days_max of 180 days and moderate stop loss. Original signal is fundamentally discretionary/macro-based and requires human judgment on regime shifts.
